name: SynchronizedBag
javadoc:
/** * Decorates another {@link Bag} to synchronize its behaviour * for a multi-threaded environment. *

* Methods are synchronized, then forwarded to the decorated bag. * Iterators must be separately synchronized around the loop. *

* This class is Serializable from Commons Collections 3.1. * * @since 3.0 * @version $Id: SynchronizedBag.java 1686855 2015-06-22 13:00:27Z tn $ */

/**
 * Constructor that wraps (not copies).

 * @param bag  the bag to decorate, must not be null
 * @throws NullPointerException if bag is null
 */
